zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Bulkeley於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭爾伊頓時，她的父親Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley42歲，母親Felice Butler32歲。她和William de Wetenhall至少有3個女兒。她去世於大約1375年在英國爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Bulkeley于大约1310年出生在英国英格兰爾伊頓时，她的父亲Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley42岁，母亲Felice Butler32岁。她和William de Wetenhall至少有3个女儿。她去世于大约1375年在英国爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Bulkeley was born about 1310, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, was 42 and her mother, Felice Butler, was 32. She had at least 3 daughters with William de Wetenhall. She died about 1375, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Bulkeley est née environ 1310, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Felice Butler, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec William de Wetenhall. Elle est décédée environ 1375, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Bulkeley um 1310 in Eaton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley 42 und ihre Mutter Felice Butler 32. Sie hatte mit William de Wetenhall mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1375 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Bulkeley è nata il circa 1310 nel Eaton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Felice Butler, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con William de Wetenhall. Morì circa 1375, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Bulkeleyが約1310年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンで生まれた時，父Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeleyは42歳，母Felice Butlerは32歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Wetenhallとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1375年にイギリスチェシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Bulkeley(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Felice Butler(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 William de Wetenhall(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1375년 영국 체실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Bulkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Felice Butler, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com William de Wetenhall. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1375, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Bulkeley родилась около 1310 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Felice Butler, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от William de Wetenhall. Она умерла около 1375 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.
